Educate • Inspire • Transform

Renewing Minds.
Shaping Futures.

Every child carries untapped potential. Through education, mentorship, scholarships, life skills and protection, we help young people build the confidence, character and purpose to create a brighter future.

Support a Child Explore Our Impact
How RECI creates change

A journey from access to leadership

Lasting transformation isn't a single hand-out. It's a path we walk with every child — three stages, one outcome.

Stage 01

Access

We help children get into school — and stay there — with enrolment support, learning materials and the safety to keep showing up.

Stage 02

Growth

Mentorship, values, life skills and academic support nurture each child's mind and character so they grow with purpose.

Stage 03

Leadership

Young people emerge confident, responsible and purpose-driven — ready to lead, and to lift others as they rise.

Our impact areas

Eight ways we walk with a child

A complete circle of support — because no single intervention raises a leader.

Most needed

Education Access

Ensuring every child has the opportunity to be in school — and to keep going.

Learning Materials

Books, supplies and educational resources placed in eager hands.

Scholarships

Supporting school enrolment and retention so finances never end a future.

Skills Development

Equipping young people with valuable life and career-ready skills.

Mentorship

Guidance and positive role models who believe in every child.

Child Protection

Shielding children from abuse, violence, exploitation and trafficking.

Character Development

Building integrity, confidence and sound judgement from within.

Leadership Development

Preparing confident, purpose-driven changemakers for tomorrow.

See all our programs
The next child is waiting

A future can change today.
Will you help turn the page?

Your support puts a child back in the classroom — with the books, teachers, and belief they need to thrive.
